c4.S1: majority=bg; two large 8-connected fg components (mono hollow + multi-color accent)
c4.S2: canvas = clean bbox crop of the mono hollow (component cells only)
c4.S3: D4-align accent by mono-frame overlap; paint non-frame accents into hollow
c4.S4: flood each enclosed hollow; fill remaining bg with majority accent seed
c4.C4: exact filled hollow grid; train-replay gated
